ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_aws.short_description: This module configures and manages Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) cloud account on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_clo.short_description: This module manages clone and thinclone of volume and volumegroup
This module configures and manages cloud backups on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_dri.short_description: This module manages drives on IBM Storage Virtualize family storage systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_dri.description: Ansible interface to manage drive-related operations.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_fc_.short_description: This module configures and manages Fibre Channel (FC) partnership on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_fcp.short_description: This module manages addition or removal of ports to or from the Fibre Channel(FC) portsets on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_fla.short_description: This module manages flashsystem-grid operations on IBM Storage Virtualize family storage systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_fla.description: Ansible interface to manage flashsystem-grid operations.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_ip_.short_description: This module manages IP partnerships on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_pro.short_description: This module configures and manages provisioning policies on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_rep.short_description: This module configures and manages replication policies on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_sec.short_description: This module manages security options on IBM Storage Virtualize family storage systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_sna.short_description: This module manages snapshots (PiT image of a volume) on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
This module manages snapshot policy configuration on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_ssl.short_description: This module exports existing system-signed certificate on to IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_sto.short_description: This module manages storage partition on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_sys.short_description: This module manages syslog server on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
This module manages system certificates and truststore for replication, high availability and FlashSystem grid on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_manage_tru.short_description: This module manages certificate trust stores for replication on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_restore_cl.short_description: This module restores the cloud backup on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_sv_switch_rep.short_description: This module switches the replication direction on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth.short_description: This module generates an authentication token for a user on IBM Storage Virtualize family system
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_auth.description: Ansible interface to generate the authentication token. The token is used to make REST API calls to the storage system.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_complete_.short_description: This module completes the initial setup configuration for LMC systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_complete_.description: It disables the GUI setup wizard for LMC systems. It is recommended to run this module after using ibm_svc_initial_setup module for intial setup configuration. This module works on SSH. Paramiko must be installed to use this module.

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_host.short_description: This module manages hosts on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_hostclust.short_description: This module manages host cluster on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_info.short_description: This module gathers various information from the IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_initial_s.short_description: This module allows users to manage the initial setup configuration on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems

ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_ca.short_description: This module manages Call Home feature configuration on IBM Storage Virtualize family systems
ibm.storage_virtualize.ibm_svc_manage_ca.description: Ansible interface to manage cloud and email Call Home feature.
